name: Fish Market Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
2. Mix the filling ingredients together and fill a 10-inch pie shell.
3. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F and bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Blend the topping ingredients and place atop the pie.
6. Bake for an additional 15 minutes at 350°F.
7. Serve warm.
